## 🏷️ Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix *(non-breaking change that fixes an issue)*
- [ ] ✨ New feature *(non-breaking change that adds functionality)*
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change *(fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)*
- [ ] 📚 Documentation *(changes to docs only, no production code affected)*
- [ ] ⚡ Performance *(change that improves performance without altering behaviour)*
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring *(code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)*

## ✅ Checklist

<!-- Ensure all items are checked before requesting a review. -->

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with **zero TypeScript errors**
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with **zero warnings or errors**
- [ ] No `Math.random()` calls in render paths (use deterministic data sources)
- [ ] No `console.log` statements in production code
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new environment variables were added
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, JSDoc, inline comments, etc.)
- [ ] Linked issue: Closes #
